posts.caption:
Back to back⁣
⁣
The fellas have filmed hundreds of concrete pours but seeing how @DGU_Baja does it is pretty incredible. The team has built an in-house mixing plant located on-site to reduce delays, improve efficiency and output quality and consistency. Management then tests and logs each batch to ensure the quality & standard of concrete is met during each pour. ⁣
⁣
________________⁣
